positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    depart(john,lga)).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    arrive(susan,lga)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    susan != john).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    lga != john).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    susan != lga).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~depart(X0,X2) | ~arrive(X0,X2)).

cnf(u18,negated_conjecture,
    ~arrive(john,lga)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for neg.tptp
2. depart(john,lga) [input(axiom)]
3. ! [X0,X1,X2] : ((depart(X0,X1) & arrive(X0,X2)) => X1 != X2) [input(axiom)]
7. ~arrive(john,lga) [input(conjecture)]
8. ~~arrive(john,lga) [negated conjecture 7]
9. arrive(john,lga) [flattening 8]
10. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (X1 != X2 | (~depart(X0,X1) | ~arrive(X0,X2))) [ennf transformation 3]
11. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (X1 != X2 | ~depart(X0,X1) | ~arrive(X0,X2)) [flattening 10]
13. depart(john,lga) [cnf transformation 2]
14. X1 != X2 | ~depart(X0,X1) | ~arrive(X0,X2) [cnf transformation 11]
18. arrive(john,lga) [cnf transformation 9]
19. ~depart(X0,X2) | ~arrive(X0,X2) [equality resolution 14]
20. ~arrive(john,lga) [resolution 19,13]
21. $false [forward subsumption resolution 20,18]
% SZS output end Proof for neg.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
